sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the data:
- The container U-shapes (id=13 and id=14) are still 7 pixels each - they didn't change
- The green item (id=2) shrank from 14 pixels to 5 pixels
- The red dot (id=4) moved from (10, 31) to (10, 28)
So clicking on the U-shape in the container caused the green item to shrink. The green item went from a 3x5 rectangle to a 3x2 shape.
Let me think about what's happening:
- The green item was originally at rows 9-11, cols 28-32 (a 3x5 rectangle)
- After clicking, it's at rows 9-11, cols 28-29 (a 3x2 rectangle)
- The red dot moved from (10, 31) to (10, 28)
The green item shrank by 3 columns (from 5 to 2). The red dot moved left by 3 positions.
Looking at the new shape:
```
Row 9: BGNNBBBB  -> G at col 27, NN at cols 28-29
Row 10: BGrNBBBB  -> G at col 27, r at col 28, N at col 29
Row 11: BGNNBBBB  -> G at col 27, NN at cols 28-29
```
So the green rectangle is now 3x2 (rows 9-11, cols 28-29) with the red dot at (10, 28).
This is interesting - the green item shrunk. Maybe I need to keep clicking to shrink it further? Or maybe I need to click on the other U-shape?
Wait, let me reconsider. The green item has a red dot inside it. When I click on the U-shape in the container, the green item shrinks. Maybe the goal is to shrink the green item completely?
Or maybe the mechanic is: clicking on a U-shape transfers a piece of the matching colored item into the container. The green item is "feeding" the container.
Let me try clicking on the other U-shape (the right one in the same container) to see if the green item shrinks further.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# The green item shrank from 3x5 to 3x2. The red dot moved left.
# Container U-shapes didn't change.
# 
# Hypothesis: Clicking on U-shapes in the container causes the matching colored item to shrink.
# The goal might be to shrink all items completely.
#
# Let me try clicking on the right U-shape in the top container to see if green shrinks more.
# The right U-shape is at cols 44-46, rows 20-22
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 21, 'col': 45}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
